scope: Claims review, clinical coding and billing process review, and KPI data validation for Department of Health Abu Dhabi regulated facilities

source_references.official_title: JAWDA Data Certification (JDC) for Healthcare Providers - Part 9 (2026)
key_sections: Claims Review (Billing, Coding and Compliance) Records Implementation Requirements
Clinical Coding and Billing Process Review Implementation Requirements

claims_review_requirements.source_section: 8.2 Claims Review (Billing, Coding and Compliance) Records Implementation Requirements

e_and_m_facility_group_rule.rule_text: Evaluation and Management codes must be billed and verified using the facility group classification instructions, not the individual facility license.

time_based_codes.rule_text: All time-based codes must have documented start and end times; total time alone is not acceptable.
time_based_codes.trigger: is_time_based_code == true AND (start_time is missing OR end_time is missing)

consent_forms.rule_text: Consent forms for applicable patients must be maintained according to DOH guidance.

lama_forms.rule_text: LAMA forms must be duly signed by the patient or authorized relative.

diagnostic_reports.rule_text: Diagnostic test reports must be signed by the performing physicians involved.

patient_signature_authenticity.rule_text: Patient signatures on consent forms must be checked for authenticity and consistency against other relevant documents.

physician_match.rule_text: The billed physician must match the actual service performer; mismatches are non-compliant and may score zero.

drgs_in_scope.rule_text: Diagnosis-Related Groups (DRGs) are included in the claims review scope.

documentation_unavailable.rule_text: If the required documentation cannot be verified due to unavailability, the item is marked Not Verified and scores zero for that field.

clinical_coding_process_review.source_section: 8.3 Clinical Coding Process Review (changed to Clinical Coding and Billing Process Review)

confidentiality_rule.rule_text: Physician documentation confidentiality must be preserved; staff should not access other clinicians' documentation.

timeliness_rule.rule_text: Individual documentation timeliness must be maintained by all relevant staff.

final_diagnosis_requirement.rule_text: Final diagnosis codes must be accurately reflected in claims after coder review.

zero_submission_rule.rule_text: KPI audits still apply even if a facility submits zero data; missing applicable KPIs count as a major finding.

not_verified_rule.rule_text: Indicators not reviewed because required information is missing are classified as Not Verified and incur a score deduction.

resubmission_rule.rule_text: Facilities graded C or D in KPI audit must resubmit corrected data within 2 to 4 weeks.

new_indicator_rule.rule_text: New indicators may be audited but may be non-scoring in the first cycle.

non_hospitals.rule: All applicable KPI indicators are included

error_counting_rule.rule_text: All discrepancies within a single sample count as one error. If total errors exceed the acceptable threshold, the indicator is Not Met.

scoring_rule.rule_text: Each indicator is scored out of 100 points. A score deduction applies only when the acceptable error threshold is exceeded.

not_met_condition.rule_text: If reviewed errors exceed the acceptable error threshold for the sample size, the indicator is classified as Not Met.

alternative_quarter_rule.rule_text: If a selected quarter has 0/0 submissions because there were no patients, an alternative quarter with available submissions may be selected.

accuracy_error_scoring.source_section: Appendix-III Table 1: Error Scoring for All Settings - Accuracy Errors

findings.finding: Mismatching patient signature or patient details
Mismatching billed physician and service performer

findings.trigger: consent_form_missing == true OR lama_form_missing == true OR lama_form_unsigned == true

findings.finding: Incorrect encounter start or end type
Other miscellaneous billing errors / incorrect date
Missing demographic details for medical tourism
Invalid physician license or missing privilege
Billed E/M code in dental claim incorrectly

medical_tourism_rules.source_section: 6 Audits on Self-Pay Services / Medical Tourism

reaudit_rules.kpi_validation_failure: Re-audit is conducted on the next subsequent quarter's data submitted after the final audit report.
reaudit_rules.claims_failure: Re-audit is conducted on new claims submitted after the final audit report.

listing_rules.source_section: 14 Listing and De-Listing / 20 New Facilities Listing and Extension of Listing

verification_logic: Check whether the code is time-based.
If time-based, verify both start_time and end_time are documented.
If either is missing, add a Major finding and deduct 20 points.
If the patient left AMA, verify the LAMA form exists and is signed.
If the LAMA form is missing or unsigned, add a Major finding and deduct 20 points.
Verify that the billed physician matches the actual service performer.
If they differ, mark the claim non-compliant and zero-score the relevant field.
For KPI validation, compare sample errors with the acceptable error threshold for the relevant sample size.
